If you meant a different plant, I can tell you about the plant Forskohlii ( Coleus forskohlii). 

Forskohlii is a plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to tropical regions of India and Nepal. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its potential health benefits such as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, improving cognitive function, and aiding in weight management.

The bioactive constituents of Forskohlii include Forskolin, a labdane diterpenoid, which is responsible for its medicinal properties. Forskolin has been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects.

Forskohlii is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and extracts.
